reason: Kept internal API DTOs explicit at route boundaries while adding product/order/user membership contracts.
Added app migration with additive columns, indexes, and defaults for product membership checkout data.
Implemented membership fulfillment as a domain-event subscriber and preserved webhook retry idempotency.
Extended Svelte routes/pages with existing embedded app patterns and API helper usage.
Used Creem billing mode, interval, and webhook event findings to shape product mapping and cancellation handling.
